结节病.summary: 腹部成像可为首个线索提示多系统疾病，基于影像模式的评估有助于缩小鉴别诊断范围。

结节病.title: Spectrum of Interstitial Lung Disease in Sarcoidosis.

结节病.title: Evidence-based role of PET imaging in cardiac and systemic sarcoidosis: an umbrella review of the current literature.

结节病.authors: Vocaturo F, Romano Gargarella E, Guarneri A, Calcagni ML, Leccisotti L
结节病.summary: PET/CT对心脏和全身结节病的活动性诊断、风险分层和治疗监测具有明确证据价值。

ILD.title: Lung disease in rheumatoid arthritis.

ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎患者中肺部疾病高发，吸烟是重要风险因素，早期CT筛查至关重要。

ILD.title: Izalontamab brengitecan (Iza-bren; BL-B01D1), a first-in-class EGFR-HER3 bispecific antibody-drug conjugate, for patients with EGFR-mutated NSCLC: pooled analysis of phase I and phase II trials.

ILD.summary: Iza-bren治疗EGFR突变NSCLC患者疗效显著，cORR达47.4%，安全性可控。

ILD.summary: 免疫检查点抑制剂相关肺炎虽不常见但死亡率高，需及时识别处理。

ILD.summary: STING通路在SAVI和COPA综合征的间质性肺病发病中起关键作用，但其与常见ILD类型的关联尚不明确。

ILD.title: Analysis of interstitial lung disease in pharmacovigilance databases: Coding challenges and interpretation biases-An update.

ILD.title: Prevalence and screening of interstitial lung disease in rheumatoid arthritis.

ILD.summary: 经电视胸腔镜肺活检确诊罕见的肺肾孤立性IgG4相关病，激素治疗有效。
